title: Follow a team in my week!
excerpt:
Easily stay on top of what your team is doing 
You can now follow any team in My Week and in the My Week Widget! 
You can see all tasks assigned to the team itself, or to any of its members.

posts.author: Abigail-monday.com (Abigail Pagi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Easily stay on top of what your team is doing
You can now follow any team in My Week and in the My Week Widget!
You can see all tasks assigned to the team itself, or to any of its members.
